'''Notsub Shipping Company''' was a shipping conglomerate owned by [[Armanda Durkin]] based in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was the largest known company on Tatooine employing an estimated 1000 people and 300 droids for its shipping and transport business. Notsub also had numerous other divisions, such as [[Notsub Security]], and a stock brokerage that owned a majority of shares of over 50 other companies based on Tatooine. It was [[Notsub Shipping Company corporate headquarters|headquartered]] on the northern edge of Mos Eisley.<ref name="GG7" />

{{Company-stub}}
